features.title: Update root layout header with blue-to-grey gradient
features.description: Modify the header element in src/app/layout.tsx to apply a top-to-bottom gradient from blue to grey using Tailwind CSS gradient utilities (e.g., from-blue-600 via-blue-400 to-gray-400 or similar). Ensure the 'Intentional Industries' text remains visible with appropriate text color contrast against the gradient background.
acceptanceCriteria: File src/app/layout.tsx contains a header element with Tailwind gradient classes (bg-gradient-to-b and color stops)
The gradient classes include 'from-' prefix with a blue shade and 'to-' prefix with a grey shade
The header text 'Intentional Industries' is present in the modified header
Running 'npm run build' completes successfully without TypeScript or build errors
Opening the application in a browser shows a visible gradient in the header area transitioning from blue (top) to grey (bottom)
features.failureReason: Generator crashed: prompt is too long: 207487 tokens > 200000 maximum
